title: cyperus alterniflorus
intro: Cyperus alterniflorus, also known as umbrella sedge, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus alterniflorus include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate various health conditions.
